behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names both files (install_with_manager.zig, security_scanner.zig), the test path test/regression/issue/28193.test.ts, the error variants (InvalidPackageID, PartialInstallFailed, NoPackagesInstalled, SecurityScannerInWorkspace), Output.errGeneric, @errorName, and the harness import requirements.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (what to cover, what to centralize, what patterns to use) but doesn't give the exact code replacement; agent still needs to write the switch branches and messages.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept either 3+ named variants OR dynamic @errorName handling, and accept either `.error => |e|` or `inline else => |e|` patterns, allowing multiple correct implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All visible tests are regex/string inspections of source files (_read_file + re.search on IWM/SS); no test compiles or runs bun to verify the actual stderr output behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific structural changes (removing empty else, adding Output calls, removing printing from security_scanner.zig, propagating .error variant) that cannot be satisfied by stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover each requirement: error visibility via output branches, variant coverage, centralization in security_scanner.zig, propagation of .error variant, and regression test existence.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names (test_catch_all_produces_output, test_error_variant_coverage, etc.), docstrings, and section comment headers (# Fail-to-pass).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers appear consistent between instruction and tests (28193.test.ts, install_with_manager.zig, security_scanner.zig).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to investigate but does not point to specific line numbers or the exact buggy code; file identification is part of the reasonable task domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
